title: Visual Ratio
description: Client-side mod that lets you customize your Minecraft aspect ratio independently from window size.
body:
## Visual Ratio 
Client-size mod.
Change Minecraft aspect ratio independently of window size.

## Features
• Keybinds to adjust ratio  
• Configurable step size  
• Works in singleplayer & multiplayer

## Issues & Feedback
Found a bug or have a feature request?
Open an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/hxragi/Visual-Ratio/issues) — all reports are welcome.
